parsed_review.summary: Read-only review of CP00-625 (RP20.P05.M02.S11-RP20.P05.M02.S20, Risk A, 10 units, micro "Type And Shape Definition"). The pack is a coherent descriptor-only fixture type-and-shape tail. Verified via Read/Grep/Glob: (1) Implementation is internally consistent across contract projection, registry, service, validators, tests, validator script, README, next-pack-queue, and closeout plan. The CP00-625 contract section (cp625_pack_binding, cp625_requirements, cp625_no_write_attestation, cp625_p05_fixture_type_shape_tail_descriptor) is a projection of code output that both packages/data-room/test/model.test.js:953 and scripts/validate-rp20-data-room-vdr-core-contract.mjs:347 assert with deepEqual. (2) All 9 required public exports exist and are wired (registry/service/validators). (3) Deliverable distribution {security_audit:2, implementation:3, fixture:1, test:3, hermes_evidence:1}=10 is correct; title-set classification confirms "Audit hint case"/"Security trimming case"->security_audit, "Claude missing-test prompt"->test (in TEST_TITLES, not CLAUDE_TITLES), and the three implementation rows. Micro-title distribution {"Type And Shape Definition":10} matches. (4) No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced in code (freezeCp625Result + no_write_attestation, synthetic_only/no_real_data/uses_real_deal_data) and asserted by validateDataRoomVdrCoreCp625P05FixtureTypeShapeTailDescriptor plus model.test.js. (5) Authority boundary correct: claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false (asserted), human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, runtime opens only at CP00-626; allowed_claude_tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob. (6) Hermes packet is descriptor-only with emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false - used solely for deterministic review packet/receipt handling, not product runtime. (7) Readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1436-byte valid JSON); no forbidden review evidence (auth failure, 0-byte, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, missing fields). Pack manifest/command-evidence/adjudication/construction-inspection correctly remain in pending pre-closeout state with production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false; nothing over-claims runtime readiness or enterprise trust. Unrelated dirty files (progress-control-room, workbook/*, matter docs) are correctly out of pack scope. The pack-level descriptor-verified claim is supported; no defects found.
